title: trifolium clusii
intro: Trifolium clusii, also known as Cluster Clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Trifolium clusii include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The herbal preparations of Trifolium clusii typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
